disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing mild abdominal fluid/swelling has worsened rapidly and dramatically over the past week despite regular water tablets
trigger_question_examples: How quickly has the swelling come on?
Are your usual water tablets helping the swelling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The swelling has always been a bit there from my liver, but this last week it's blown up huge and fast, and the water tablets aren't touching it anymore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant unintentional weight loss with visible wasting of arms and face over a short period
trigger_question_examples: Have your clothes or rings become loose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a lot of weight — maybe 10 kilos — and the flesh has gone off my arms and face, all in a short time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New continuous, localised, deep right-upper-quadrant ache — insidious over 2 months, severe and constant in the last week
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and what is it like?
How long has the ache been there?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a constant deep throbbing ache under my right ribs. It started as a dull ache a couple of months back and it's been severe and never-ending this past week.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Yellowing of the eyes and skin
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any yellowing of your eyes or skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The whites of my eyes and my skin have gone yellow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete loss of appetite with early satiety and inability to maintain oral intake
trigger_question_examples: How is your appetite and eating?
Are you able to keep food and fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got no appetite at all and I feel full after a single mouthful — I really can't eat or drink much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound generalised weakness and malaise — now bedbound
trigger_question_examples: How are you managing to move around?
How is your energy and strength?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely wrung out and weak — I can't really get out of bed anymore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness related to the tight, distended abdomen — eased by sitting upright, worse lying flat
trigger_question_examples: Are you finding it hard to breathe?
Is the breathing worse lying down or sitting up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When the belly is really tight I get breathless, and it's easier if I sit propped up rather than lie flat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known established cirrhosis secondary to chronic hepatitis C (patient-stated baseline condition)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any known liver problems?
What is your past medical history?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I've got cirrhosis, scarring of the liver, from a hepatitis C infection I've had for years.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Regular use of two diuretics (spironolactone and furosemide) that were previously effective but now are not controlling the fluid
trigger_question_examples: What medications are you taking for the fluid?
Have the water tablets stopped working?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I take two water tablets — spironolactone and frusemide — every day, but lately they don't seem to shift the fluid at all.
